name: JSON Extract
description: Pull values out of a JSON document by dot-path, so one tool's output can feed another's input.

data.description: Any JSON value to read from.

paths.description: Dot-paths to extract, e.g. "user.name" or "items.0.id". Use "*" to map over an array.

defaultValue.description: Returned for a path that does not resolve. Defaults to null.

values.description: One entry per requested path, keyed by the path.
